4000.full_name: Usama bin Sharek al-Tha'labi of B.Tha'laba bin Sa'd

4001.full_name: Usama bin 'Umayr b. 'Amir b. al-Aqayshir b. 'Abdullah b. Habib of B.Hudhayl

4002.full_name: 'Amr bin 'Absa bin Khalid b. Hudayfa b. 'Amr b. Khalaf b. Mazin b. Tha'laba b. Bahtha b. Sulaym
4002.bio: عمرو بن عبسة بن خالد بن حذيفة بن عمرو بن خلف بن مازن بن مالك بن ثعلبة بن بهثة بن سليم بن منظور بن عكرمة بن خصفة بن قيس بن عيلان بن مضر or عمرو بن عبسة بن عامر بن خالد بن غاضرة بن عتاب بن امرئ القيس بن بهثة بن سليم

4003.bio: He came to treat Prophet(ﷺ) as Quraish told him that he(ﷺ) has became insane. But Prophet(ﷺ) read some supplications and he accepted Islam.

4004.full_name: Malik & Nu'man bin Khalaf b. 'Auf b. Daram b. 'Anz b. Waila b. Sahm b. Mazin b. al-Harith b. Salaman
4004.arabic: مالك ونعمان خلف بن عوف بن دارم
4004.bio: According to some sources, both brother were at Uhud and both got martyrdom.

4005.full_name: Kulthum bin al-Husain b. Khalid b. al-Mughira b. Zayd b. Ahmas b, Ghafar...b. 'Abd Manat b. Kinana
4005.bio: There is some disagreement over his lineage. He was seriously injured in the battle of Uhud but recovered when Prophet(ﷺ) used his spit on his wound.
4005.teachers: حديثا طويلا في قصة غزوة تبوك

4006.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Habib from B.Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr b. 'Abd Manat b. Kinana
4006.father_name: al-Habib from B.Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr
4006.mother_name: Umm Naufal bint Naufal of B.Asad
4006.bio: His participation and martyrdom at Uhud is not agreed upon.

4007.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin al-Habib from B.Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr b. 'Abd Manat b. Kinana
4007.father_name: al-Habib from B.Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr
4007.mother_name: Umm Naufal bint Naufal of B.Asad
4007.bio: His participation and martyrdom at Uhud is not agreed upon.

4008.full_name: Ja'l/Ja'ayl bin Saraqa al-Damri or al-Tha'labi or Ghafari or Ansari of B.Sawad

4009.bio: He became Muslim just before the battle of Uhud with his nephew, al-Harith bin 'Uqba. Both fought hard in the battle and eventually martyred. This story may not be authentic.

4010.arabic: الحارث بن عقبة بن قابوس المزني
4010.bio: He became Muslim just before the battle of Uhud with his uncle, wahb bin Qabous. Both fought hard in the battle and eventually martyred. This story may not be authentic.

4011.full_name: 'Amr bin Umayya bin Khwaylid b. 'Abdulllah bin Iyas b. 'Abd b. Nashra b. Ka'b b. Jadi b. Damra
4011.bio: He became Muslim after battle of Uhud. He was sent to Abyssinia as a messenger for Prophet(ﷺ) to king Al-Najashi.

4012.full_name: Bakr bin Umayya bin Khwaylid b. 'Abdulllah bin Iyas b. 'Abd b. Nashra b. Ka'b b. Jadi b. Damra..

4013.full_name: Umm Tariq Client of Sa'd bin 'Ubada

4014.full_name: Umm Farwa, grandmother/Aunt of al-Qasim bin Ghannam

4015.full_name: Maymuna bin Kardam bin Sufyan b. Abban b. Yasar b. Malik b. Hutayt b. Jashm al-Thaqafi

4016.full_name: Kardam bin Sufyan b. Abban b. Yasar b. Malik b. Hutayt b. Jashm al-Thaqafi

4019.full_name: Husayn bin Umm Al-Husayn bint Ishaq al-Ahmasiyya

4021.bio: There is some disagreement over his lineage.

4022.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Amr bin al-Ahwas al-Azdi or al-Jashmi
4022.arabic: عبد الله بن عمرو بن الأحوص الأزدي
4022.bio: There is some disagreement over his lineage.

4025.full_name: Salama bint al-Hurr b. Qays b. Hasan b. Hudhayfa b. Badr al-Fazariyya or al-Zadiyya

4026.full_name: Kharsha bin  al-Hurr b. Qays b. Hasan b. Hudhayfa b. Badr al-Fazari
4026.bio: He was an orphan in the care of 'Umar bin al-Kahttab. He was considered as a Tabi'

4027.full_name: Basira/Yasira, grandmother of Humayda bint Yasir

4028.teachers: عنها ربيعة بن عبد الرحمن بن حصن,هي جدته

4029.full_name: Qayla, Umm/Aukht Bani Anmar (mother or sister of B.Anmar)

4033.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin al-Zubayr bin Bata al-Qarzi

4034.full_name: al-Zubayr bin 'Abdur Rahman bin al-Zubayr bin Bata al-Qarzi
4034.arabic: الزبير بن عبد الرحمن بن الزبير القرظي
4034.bio: He is considered as a Tabi'.

4035.full_name: Fatima bint al-Dahhak al-Kailabiyya or 'Amra bint Zayd or al-'Aaliyya bint Zabyan or Saba bin Sufyan
4035.bio:
Fatima bint al-Dahhak bin Sufyanal-Kailabiyya or
'Amra bint Zayd/Yazid bin 'Ubayd bin Ruwas, b. Kilab or
al-'Aaliyya bint Zabyan bin 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Ka'b b. 'Abd b. Abi Bakr b. Kilab or
Saba bin Sufyan b. 'Auf b. Ka'b b. 'Abd b. Abi Bakr b. Kilab
There is disagreement over her name. She was married to Prophet(ﷺ) but was divorced before consummation.

4036.full_name: Asma' bin al-Nu'man bin Abi al-Jawn b. al-Aswad b. al-Harith or Asma' bint Ka'b al-Jawniyya
4036.bio: There is disagreement over her name. She was married to Prophet(ﷺ) but was divorced before consummation.

4037.full_name: Mulayka bint Ka'b al-Laythi or al-Kinaniyya
4037.bio: There is disagreement over her name. According to some,she was married to Prophet(ﷺ) but was divorced before consummation.

4038.short_name: The daughter of Jundab bin Damra
4038.full_name: The daughter of Jundab bin Damra al-Jundi
4038.bio: According to some, she was married to Prophet(ﷺ) but was divorced before consummation.

4039.full_name: Saba/Sana bint al-Salt bin Habib al-Sulamiyya
4039.bio: There is disagreement over her name. She was married to Prophet(ﷺ) but she died before he reached her.

4040.full_name: Safiyya bint Bashama bin Nadla from B. al-'Anbari b. Tamim

4041.full_name: Khawla bint al-Hudhayl bin Hibira b. Qabisa bin al-Harith b. habib b. Hurfa b. Tha'laba of B.Taghlab
4041.bio: According to some Prophet(ﷺ) married her but she died before reaching him.

4042.full_name: Sharaf bint Khalifa b. Farwah b. Fadalah b. Zayd b. Imri'ul-Qays b. al-Khazraj al-kalbiyya
4042.bio: According to some Prophet(ﷺ) married her but she was divorced before consummation.

4043.full_name: Duba'a bint 'Amr bin Qurat b. Salma b. Qushayr b. Ka'b b. Rabi'a b. 'Amir b. Sa'Sa'
4043.bio: ضباعة بنت عامر بن قرط بن سلمة بن قشير بن كعب بن ربيعة بن عامر بن صعصعة
4043.spouses: Hawda bin 'Ali al-Hanafi,'Abduulah bin Jid'an al-Taym,Hisham b. al-Mughirah

4044.full_name: al-Harith bin 'Auf/Malik (b. al-Harith) b. Asad b. Jabir b. 'Awayra b. 'Abd Manat b. 'Ashja'
4044.bio:
According to some, he participated at Badr (Very unlikely). Other said that he became Muslim later on the day of conquest. There is also differences regarding his date of death.
عوف بن الحارث بن أسد بن جابر بن عويرة بن عبد مناة بن أشجع بن عامر بن ليث بن بكر بن عبد مناة بن علي بن كنانة

4045.full_name: Qays bin 'Abdullah b. 'Adas(Wahwah) b. Ja'da b. Ka'b b. Rabi'a b. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'a
4045.bio:
He lived for 120 Years. There are differences regarding his lineage.
قيس بن عبد الله بن عدس بن ربيعة بن جعدة وقيل بدل عدس وحوح وجعدة هو بن كعب بن ربيعة بن عامر بن صعصعة

4047.full_name: Wahb bin 'Abdullah b. Muslim b. Junada b. Habib b. Sawai' of B. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'a

4048.full_name: Suday bin 'Ajalan b. Wahb b. 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Rabah b. al-Harith b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Tha'laba b. Qays

4049.full_name: Wathla bin al-'Asqa' bin 'Abdul -'Uzza b. 'Abd Yalil b. Nashib b. Ghira b. Sa'd b. Laith b. Bakr
4049.bio:
واثلة بن الأسقع بن كعب بن عامر بن ليث بن عبد مناة ويقال بن الأسقع بن عبد الله بن عبد يا ليل بن ناشب بن غيرة بن سعد بن ليث أبو الأسقع ويقال أبو قرصافة ويقال أبو محمد ويقال أبو الخطاب ويقال أبو شداد الليثي
Also known as: Au Qursafa, Abu Qurdafa, Abu Shadad, Abu Muhammad Other Lineage: Wathla bin al-'Asqa' bin Ka'b bin 'Amir b. Laith b. 'Abd Manat

4050.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Harith bin Jaz' b. 'Abdullah b. Ma'di Karb b. 'Amr b. 'Asm b. 'Amr b....b. Zubiad
4050.arabic: عبد الله بن الحارث بن جزء الزبيدي

4051.full_name: Tamim bin Usayd or 'Abdullah bin al-Harith b. Asad b. 'Adi b. Jundal b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Tamim
4051.bio: Full lineage: 'Abdullah bin al-Harith b. Asad b. 'Adi b. Jundal b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Tamim b. al-Dou'l b. Haml b. 'Adi b. 'Abd Manat b. Ad b. Tabkha b. Ilyas b. Mudar

4052.full_name: Ka'b bin 'Ajra b. 'Amr b. Umayya of B.Salm B.'Auf or An ally of B.Khazraj from Bali or from B.Quda'a
4052.bio:
Also known as: Abu 'Abdullah
His lineage is not agreed upon.

4053.full_name: Jundab bin 'Abdullah bin Sufyan al-Bajli, al-'Alqi
4053.arabic: جندب بن عبد الله بن سفيان البجلي

4055.full_name: Safwan bin Mu'ttal b. Rabi'a/Rahda b. Khuza'i b. Muharib b. Murra b. Falij b. Zakwan b. Tha'laba
4055.bio: He is known for his role in the story of Slander of 'Aisha(RA). He found 'Aisha(RA) alone during a journey and brought her back to Medina.

4056.full_name: Jurthum or Juthuma or Jurham bin Nashim/Nashib or Lashir bin Jurthuma
4056.bio: There are lot of different versions of his name and lineage.

4057.full_name: Jarir bin 'Abdullah bin Jabir(al-Salayl) b. Malik b. Nadr b. Tha'laba b. Jushum b. 'Awaif
4057.bio: He was sent to some of the kings of Yemen.

4058.bio: He may have accepted Islam after Prophet(ﷺ) (considerd as Tabi')

4060.full_name: Hanzala bin al-Rabi' bin Sayfi b. Ribah b. al-Harith b. Mukhashan ...b. Usayd b. 'Amr b. Tamim

4061.full_name: Rabah/Rayah bin al-Rabi' bin Sayfi b. Ribah b. al-Harith b. Mukhashan ...b. Usayd b. 'Amr b. Tamim

4063.full_name: Abaydh bin Hammal b. Marthad b. Dhil Haaq b. Sa'd b. 'Auf b. 'Adi b. Malik b. Zayd b. Malik b. Zayd

4064.full_name: Ahmar bin Jaz'(bin Saw' bin Jaz')(bin Mua'wiya) bin Tha'laba b. Zayd b. Malik b. Sinan al-Sudoosi
4064.father_name: Jaz'(bin Saw' bin Jaz')(bin Mua'wiya) bin Tha'laba

4067.full_name: Asmar bin Mudras b. Aus b. Haritha b. Laam al-Tai'

4068.full_name: 'Urwa bin Mudras b. Aus b. Haritha b. Laam  b. 'Amr b. Tarif b. 'Amr b. 'Amir al-Tai'

4069.full_name: al-Aswad bin Sari' bin Humayr b. 'Ubada b. Nazal b. Murra ... b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat
4069.bio: Full lineage : al-Aswad bin Sari' bin Humayr b. 'Ubada b. Nazal b. Murra b. 'Ubaid b. Muqa's b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim

4071.full_name: al-Aghar bin Yasar('Abdullah) al-Mazni or al-Juhani

4073.full_name: Umayyah bin Mukhshi al-Khuza'i or al-Azdi

4074.full_name: Anas bin Malik al-Kabi al-Qushayri from B. Qushayr b. Ka'b b. Rabi'a b. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'

4077.bio: He was most likely a Tabi'. He was son of Abu Dhar's wife or sister. There is some confusion whether he and Ahban bin Sayfi (Id:4076) are same person or not.

4079.full_name: Basr bin Artah (Abi Artha) 'Umayr bin 'Uwaymar b. 'Imran b. al-Halays b. Siyar b. Nazar b. Mu'ays
4079.teachers: حديثين أحدهما لا تقطع الأيدي في السفر

4080.full_name: Basr bin Jahash Qurashi of B. Amir b. Lu'ayy

4081.full_name: Bashr bin Sahaym bin Falan bin Haram bin Ghaffar or al-Nahrani or al-Khuza'i
4081.father_name: Sahaym bin Falan bin Haram bin Ghaffar

4082.full_name: Basheer bin M'abad(bin Zayd or Sharahayl) b. Ma'bad b. Aabab b. Saba' b. Sudoos
4082.bio:
old Name: Zaham or Nazeer. His name was changed by Prophet(ﷺ) to Basheer.
There are various versions of his lineage.

4083.full_name: Layla/al-Juhdama wife of Basheer bin M'abad/al-Khasasiyya
4083.bio: According to some scholars, Prophet(ﷺ) changed her name from Judhama to Layla.

4084.full_name: Basheer al-Harithi al-Ka'bi from B. al-Harith b. Ka'b
4084.bio: His name was Akbar but it was changed to Basheer by Prophet(ﷺ)

4085.full_name: Basra bin AKthum al-Ansari or al-Khuza'i

4086.full_name: Basra bin Abi Basra (Jamil) bin Basra b. Waqqas b. Ghaffar

4087.full_name: Hamil/Jamil bin Basra b. Waqqas b. Ghaffar
4087.arabic: حميل بن بصرة أبو بصرة الغفاري
4087.bio: His son and grandson are considered as companion although there are some confusion regarding their names.

4088.short_name: Jamil bin Basra bin Abi Basra
4088.full_name: Jamil bin Basra bin Abi Basra (Jamil) bin Basra b. Waqqas b. Ghaffar
4088.arabic: جميل بن بصرة بن أبي بصرة الغفاري

4089.full_name: Bakr bin Mubbashr bin Jabr al-Ansari al-Ausi

4091.full_name: Bilal bin al-Harith  b. 'Asm b. Sa'id b. Qurra b. Khalawa b. Tha'laba b. Thur

4092.full_name: Basr bin Abi Basr Al-Maazni from B.Maazin bin Mansur

4093.full_name: Al-Talb bin Tha'laba bin Rabi'a b. 'Atiya b. Ukhayf b. Ka'b b. al-'Anbar b. 'Amr b. Tamim
4093.arabic: التلب بن ثعلبة بن ربيعة التميمي

4094.full_name: Jabir bin Sulaym/Sulaym bin Jabir from B.Anmar b. al-Hujaym b. 'Amr b. Tamim

4096.full_name: Jariya bin Qadama b. (Malik b.) Zuhayr b. al-Husain b. Razah b. Sa'd b. Bujayr b. Rabi'a b. Ka'b ..
4096.bio:
Full Lineage: Jariya bin Qadama b. (Malik b.) Zuhayr b. al-Husain b. Razah b. Sa'd b. Bujayr b. Rabi'a b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
He was uncle of al-Ahnaf bin Qays.

4097.full_name: Jubayr bin Nufayr bin Malik bin 'AMir
4097.bio: He is considered a Tabi' or Makhdaram

4098.arabic: نفير بن مالك بن عامر الحضرمي
